collections.name: repo_src-all-minilm_l6-v2
collections.description: Source code files from the repository, processed file-by-file. Each file is embedded as a whole using all-minilm-l6-v2. For files parsed by ctags, multiple symbol-level entries (functions, methods, structs, modules, etc.) are created with line ranges and metadata. Ideal for semantic search over implementations, definitions, and symbol relationships.
collections.notes_on_metadata: Core keys are always present for symbol entries. Additional language-specific tag fields (e.g. signature, access, scope, path, module, etc.) may appear depending on ctags output for the language/kind.

example_queries.query: How is error handling implemented in the CLI?
example_queries.where: language = 'rust' AND kind IN ['function', 'method'] AND file CONTAINS 'cli'
language = 'rust' AND name CONTAINS 'read' AND kind = 'function'

example_queries.query: Where is function xyz defined and used?

collections.name: repo_hist-all-minilm_l6-v2
collections.description: Git commit history from the 'src' directory. Each commit is split into: (1) the commit message (type='message'), and (2) individual diff hunks (type='hunk') with old/new line ranges. All parts embedded with all-minilm-l6-v2. Perfect for temporal questions, authorship, change rationale, and diff context.
collections.notes_on_metadata: 'type' is either 'message' (commit message) or 'hunk' (diff chunk). 'file', 'old_start/old_ct', 'new_start/new_ct' are only present on hunks. 'date' is in standard git log format (e.g. 'Mon Jan 6 12:34:56 2025 +0100').

example_queries.where: date > '2025-12-01' AND document CONTAINS 'error' AND type = 'hunk'

example_queries.query: Fixes to file reading by Alice
example_queries.where: author CONTAINS 'alice' AND document CONTAINS 'fixed' AND file CONTAINS 'read'
date CONTAINS 'Mar 2026' AND file CONTAINS 'cli' AND type = 'hunk'
